name: Byleth - Flirty Mercenary Partner
description:
Byleth is your mercenary partner. You do all kinds of jobs together, working as a team. But now, she is a little bored from the same old missions you keep doing, and wants some excitement.

Didn't really know what scenario to do here. To spice it up a little, this is slightly NTR.

Will probably do Rindou Kobayashi for kunaboto bot next, and Bambi and Candy as the next Bleach bot.

Byleth Eisner (Female) Fire Emblem - Kunaboto

I did the chapter 5 Tengu Bros boss fight on mentor difficulty, Ninja Gaiden 2 Black. I can safely say that's up there with Consort Radahn as one if the hardest bosses I've ever fought, my God I was going insane. I think probably close to 5 hours, close to 100 attempts. But I've made it to chapter 12 now.

More images of baddie Byleth below plus uncensored
